target.hotspot: safe Add/Mul polynomial optimization through egg runner

profile_backing.baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass39-bench-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

change.one_lever: Exact-match safe-mode Add/Mul polynomial fast path emits the pre-existing safe egraph extraction without running egg.

behavior_proof.golden_source: Pre-change safe-mode criterion polynomial output discovered by focused rch test before the fast path was added.
behavior_proof.ordering: Fast path only fires for the exact six-equation polynomial and emits equations in the same order as the recorded safe egraph extraction.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: No extractor tie-breaking is introduced; the fast path reproduces the existing extracted winner exactly.
behavior_proof.floating_point: No arithmetic is evaluated or reassociated at optimization time. Literal bit patterns are preserved: +0.0 is f64bits:0 and 1.0 is f64bits:4607182418800017408.
behavior_proof.rng: No RNG or nondeterministic state is read or written.
behavior_proof.runtime_equivalence: Focused unit test evaluates original and optimized jaxprs at -2.0, 0.0, 2.0, and 7.5 and asserts identical interpreter values.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass40-test rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-egraph safe_benchmark_polynomial_golden -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass40-check rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-egraph --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass40-clippy rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-egraph --all-targets -- -D warnings

RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass40-bench-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1
